description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: unit-test, run-coverage, and upload-coverage. The unit-test job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, installing dependencies and running tests with tox. The run-coverage job runs on a matrix of Python 3.10 and operating systems, installing dependencies, running tests with tox, and generating a coverage report. The upload-coverage job depends on run-coverage, downloads the coverage artifact, combines the reports, and uploads the coverage to Coveralls.
